title: Rich Dense Greek Chickpeas Stew
description: A hearty, jain-friendly Greek-inspired chickpea stew packed with mustard powder and aromatics, perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: cooked chickpeas
ingredients.notes: use canned or soak and cook dry

ingredients.name: yellow mustard powder
ingredients.notes: adds depth and a slight tang

instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tbsp olive oil over medium heat.
Add ground cumin, dried red chili flakes, and a pinch of salt. Sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in yellow mustard powder and dried oregano; cook for another 30 seconds.
Add canned diced tomatoes, cooked chickpeas, and 1 cup of water. Bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the stew bubble for 25 minutes, allowing flavors to meld and the stew to thicken.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, then stir in fresh lemon juice and chopped dill.
If using feta, fold in crumbled cheese just before serving to keep it from disintegrating.
Serve hot or let cool and refrigerate for up to 4 days for meal‑prep.
Reheat gently on the stovetop or in the microwave before serving.
